steps.title: Identify the sequence pattern
steps.content: The sequence starts with $7$ and each term after the first is $3$ times the preceding term. This is a geometric sequence with first term $7$ and common ratio $3$.

steps.title: Write the nth term
steps.content: For a geometric sequence, the $n$th term is $$w=a r^{n-1}$$ Substitute $a=7$ and $r=3$: $$w=7(3)^{n-1}$$ The answer is D.
